meaning: vt.使免疫,赋予免疫性,使成为无害
examples: They need to immunize teams against group think: Hackman argued that the best ones contain "deviants".
Ambulances were rushed in and teams of doctors and nurses from other areas helped immunize survivors against disease.
All countries should immunize their health-care workers as a first priority to protect the essential health infrastructure.
In contrast, Offit argues, the problems caused by the bacteria the vaccines immunize against are very real.
The Supreme Court heard arguments yesterday in a much-watched case that could immunize the drug industry against massive lawsuits.
